loc_discipline.evidence: 11 source files >300 LOC. daemon.rs=782, companion.js=683, history.js=528, session-lifecycle.js=492, events.js=418, app.js=413. CSS monolith (styles.css=1967) partially split but root file still active.
loc_discipline.verdict: Many >300 LOC files. SRP violated across most major modules.

validation_coverage.evidence: Rust IPC boundaries use serde::Deserialize typed structs + strict path allowlist in file_io.rs. JS uses esc() for all user-controlled HTML, DOMPurify for markdown output. No Zod/JSON Schema on JS input path (but Tauri typed IPC provides some coverage). CSP set but includes unsafe-inline.
validation_coverage.verdict: Good boundary enforcement; no JS-side input schema; unsafe-inline weakens CSP.

secrets_hygiene.evidence: No hardcoded secrets found. Config via std::env::var(HOME). No .env files. No secret manager integration. No lint rules enforcing this.
secrets_hygiene.verdict: Env-based loading is correct. No secret manager or automated scan in CI.

state_persistence.evidence: Nim balance + session state in localStorage (volatile on WebKit cache clear). DaemonState in Arc<Mutex<>> — lost on app restart. JSONL append for vexil_feed — no compaction. History in ~/.local/share/*.jsonl files. No idempotency keys anywhere.
state_persistence.verdict: Mixed ad-hoc persistence. In-memory daemon state is lost on restart. No durability guarantees.

errors_retry_idempotency.evidence: Rust: Result<T, String> throughout — no structured error types (no thiserror/anyhow). 3 remaining .unwrap() on mutex locks in misc.rs (non-test). JS: try/catch with UI error surfacing. Rate-limit events handled with retry count display. No retry/backoff for oracle subprocess calls (timeout only). No idempotency keys.
errors_retry_idempotency.verdict: Basic error handling present. No structured types, no retry/backoff, no idempotency.

testing_ci.evidence: 28 tests total: 15 JS (nim + dom), 13 Rust (daemon_patterns + sync_buddy_parity). All passing. 2-job CI on push/PR to main. No coverage gate. Major modules untested: companion.js (683 LOC), session-lifecycle.js (492 LOC), events.js (418 LOC), app.js (413 LOC), voice.js (423 LOC).
testing_ci.verdict: Units + basic CI present. Coverage of business-critical JS modules is ~10%.
